items.name: Enrapture Exclusive Royal Siren Mermaid Tail
items.description:
The Only 1 Tradable of Its Kind! 

Step into the legacy of legends with Enrapture’s Exclusive Royal Siren Mermaid Tail—an iconic collector’s item. This one-of-a-kind, tradable masterpiece is crafted by Enrapture.world, the renowned creators behind top-selling content in Second Life, and now launching the highly anticipated "Far Away Kingdom" on Roblox. This tail is not just an accessory; it's a symbol of prestige that will be instantly recognized by every player in the game and highly wanted upon game publishing.

This is the sole tradable Royal Siren Tail ever to exist, designed exclusively for "Far Away Kingdom." With its regal hues and intricate details, this tail embodies the essence of the ocean's most majestic creature. As the sole owner of this rare treasure, you will rule the underwater realms with grace and authority, carrying the legacy of the Royal Siren into the world of Far Away Kingdom.

Once it’s gone, it's gone forever. 
A Piece of Gaming History - your legacy awaits.
